headline: Agent tooling breaks out across subagents, scheduled tasks, and skill composition as multi-provider workflows consolidate.
body: A cluster of agent-construction tools is breaking out together, led by a seven-level Hermes agent walkthrough that connects Claude, ChatGPT, Grok, and DeepSeek into unified workflows with custom skills, parallel subagents, and scheduled tasks. Open source surfaces on two fronts: Voicebox, a local voice studio with system-wide dictation positioned against ElevenLabs, and MiniMax M3, an open-weights coding model with 1-million-token context and Anthropic and OpenAI compatible endpoints. Schema conversion and AI tutoring appear in Google Cloud's Database Migration Service, which uses Gemini to translate SQL Server schemas to PostgreSQL. On the opinion side, a podcast weighs whether AI agents should manage passwords and detect compromises alongside a record Patch Tuesday.
